nasb.text: Samuel came to Saul, and Saul said to him, “Blessed are you of the Lord! I have carried out the command of the Lord.”

esv.text: And Samuel came to Saul, and Saul said to him, “Blessed be you to the Lord. I have performed the commandment of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 撒母耳到了掃羅那裡，掃羅對他說：“願耶和華賜福給你！我已經執行了耶和華的命令。”

ccb.text: 撒母耳到了扫罗那里后，扫罗说：“愿耶和华赐福给你，我已经遵守了耶和华的命令。”
